summary: Dashboard renders correctly in mobile narrow viewport with proper drawer navigation and empty state handling. Minor palette violations present but non-blocking for authenticated routes.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard uses neutral/generic palette (white/gray backgrounds) instead of sharing the diner palette with public routes. Creates brand discontinuity after login.

actions: Consider implementing shared brand palette between public marketing and authenticated surfaces to maintain visual continuity
Verify that mobile drawer navigation remains functional across all dashboard routes at 390px viewport
